data.content: Shipment review approved. Local main, origin/main, and v0.14.17 all resolve to 20e0e53d; package version at the tag is 0.14.17. Knot tags include both implementation and release commits, the review branch, and release tag. Main CI and Coverage Badge succeeded for b85d2479; Release Runtime Artifact succeeded for 20e0e53d. The public non-draft, non-prerelease release contains three platform tarballs and matching .sha256 assets. The shipped code preserves kno workflow authority and the existing reasoning-setting contract. No dependent-system regressions observed.
